productDisplayName: Puma Unisex  White & Green  Flip Flops
description: Style Note This absolutely stylish pair of TropiCat IND flip flops from puma makes it a fantastic casual wear. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet while the minimalist design of the cat adds a classy look. The brand badge coupled with a velvety inner along the straps is a perfect combination of comfort and style. The TPU outsole with circular grooves ensures great grip on damp surfaces, making it a great beachwear and pool side slipper. Product Details Green and white footbed with busy print Fabric thong style straps Patterned grooves all along the outsole Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
